item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode and provided an ordinary step order for adding the device pickup entry while accounting for the three prior onboarding-process changes. It did not invoke triage, Anti-Spiral, 3L5S, or treat the mixed unrelated changes as repeated local repair pressure."}
